name: 1000 Follower Special!
description:
So first of all... I want to thank you all for 1,000+ followers! This is absolutely insane, I genuinely cannot believe there are this many of you that like my silly little bots.

Setting: Post-Forsaken, Robloxia

Scenario:

It's John and Jane Doe's anniversary! The whole gang is back to celebrate!

Cast:

Noob, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Guest 1337, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure.

Slasher, John Doe, Mafioso (and gang), Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, MrDoombringer, Guest 666/Sixer.

Daisy, Charlotte, Jane Doe, Jan, BrightEyes.

About the bot:

I needed an excuse to write a party, and since it's still February... A cute romantic setup seems adorable.

SFW / Suggestive / NSFW

TWs: Nothing, this is just super fluffy.

Requests: Open / Pending / CLOSED

Join my Discord! -> https://discord.gg/YbAAMU2KgE

Also, before you go ahead, I just want to make a teeny disclaimer. Bots will likely be super slow to publish from now on. Your local ferret got a job! This means more freedom for yours truly, but also means I have less free time.

I also wanna put a gentle reminder that these bots are, in fact, made in my (now limited) free time and mostly for fun! As much as I wish I could bring everybody's ideas to life, I'm only one person. So please don't get mad and attack me (or worse, beg) if I don't make a certain thing, or if the bots I do make seem buggy. I can't control the AI itself. I have rules in all of my bots but that's all I can do. Please don't yell at me if it talks for you, or mixes people up 💔

Thank you all again, and remember, as always, to drink some water!
creator: Subconscious
